name: Bayfront Marine
tagline: Custom-built docks and lifts for South Tampa waterfront homes.
about: Family-owned since 2008, Bayfront Marine specializes in turnkey dock and boat lift builds across Tampa Bay. We handle design, permitting, pilings, decking, electrical, and lift installation in-house — no subcontracted handoffs.

services.name: New dock construction
services.desc: Composite, Trex, and Brazilian hardwood decking on concrete or composite pilings.

services.name: Boat lift installation
services.desc: 4-post and elevator lifts from 6,000 to 30,000 lbs with smart controls.

services.name: Seawall repair & build
services.desc: Vinyl and concrete seawall panels with helical tieback systems.

services.name: Permitting & engineering
services.desc: We handle ACOE, FDEP, and county submittals end-to-end.

projects.name: Davis Islands 220ft seawall + dock
projects.summary: Vinyl seawall rebuild with 60ft T-dock, 16,000 lb lift, and night lighting.

projects.name: Apollo Beach private dock
projects.summary: Composite L-dock with twin jet ski platforms and remote-controlled lift.

projects.name: Tampa Bay yacht club refit
projects.summary: Replaced 8 finger piers with low-maintenance composite decking.

testimonials.author: Marcus T.
testimonials.quote: They pulled permits in 6 weeks and finished 3 days ahead of schedule. Crew cleaned up every single night.

testimonials.author: Lena K.
testimonials.quote: We got three bids — Bayfront was the most detailed and the most honest about what would and wouldn't survive a storm.

faqs.q: How long does a typical dock build take?
faqs.a: From signed contract to handover: usually 10–14 weeks, of which 5–7 are permitting.

faqs.q: Do you handle seawall and dock together?
faqs.a: Yes — bundling saves on mobilization and lets us sequence pilings around the seawall tieback.

name: Gulf Coast Dock Co.
tagline: Composite-first dock builders serving Pinellas County since 2012.
about: Gulf Coast Dock Co. focuses on low-maintenance composite builds and storm-damage repairs across Clearwater, Dunedin, and Belleair. Most of our work is referral-based — we keep the crew small on purpose.

services.name: Composite dock builds
services.desc: Trex Transcend and TimberTech AZEK on aluminum or composite framing.

services.name: Storm damage repair
services.desc: Insurance-friendly assessments and rebuilds for hurricane-damaged docks.

services.name: Decking replacement
services.desc: Swap rotting wood for composite while keeping existing pilings.

projects.name: Belleair Causeway storm rebuild
projects.summary: Helene-damaged dock rebuilt with reinforced pilings and elevated electrical.

projects.name: Dunedin composite refit
projects.summary: Replaced 800 sq ft of pressure-treated decking with composite over two weekends.

testimonials.author: Priya R.
testimonials.quote: After Helene we had three contractors ghost us. Gulf Coast showed up the next week and started the insurance paperwork for us.

faqs.q: Can you reuse my existing pilings?
faqs.a: If pilings pass our sound + visual inspection and have 10+ years of expected life, yes — we'll only replace decking and framing.

name: Salt & Cedar Builders
tagline: Bespoke waterfront design — docks, seawalls, and outdoor living.
about: We're a design-build shop. Half our projects start as a hand sketch with the homeowner. Expect more thought on shade, lighting, and outdoor kitchens than a typical dock builder.
address: 6602 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572

services.name: Custom dock design
services.desc: Drawings, 3D renderings, and material specs before a single piling goes in.

services.name: Seawall builds
services.desc: Vinyl and architectural concrete seawalls with integrated steps and access.

services.name: Outdoor living integration
services.desc: Dock-side kitchens, fire features, shade structures, and lighting.

projects.name: MiraBay U-dock with shade pergola
projects.summary: Custom U-dock with cedar pergola, integrated bar, and Sonos zone.

projects.name: Apollo Beach seawall + steps
projects.summary: Architectural concrete seawall with cast-in stairs and limestone caps.

testimonials.author: Daniel & Iris H.
testimonials.quote: They actually listened. We ended up with a pergola we didn't know we wanted and now use the dock every night.

faqs.q: Do you handle smaller repair jobs?
faqs.a: Rarely — we focus on full design-build projects $40k+. We're happy to refer you out for smaller work.

name: Tideline Construction
tagline: Permit-first marine contractor across St. Pete and Tierra Verde.
about: Tideline is led by a former county permit reviewer. We win on hard sites — manatee zones, mangrove setbacks, and properties caught between FDEP and ACOE jurisdictions.

services.name: Permitting consulting
services.desc: Sole-source permit packages for ACOE, FDEP, SWFWMD, and county.

services.name: Seawall construction
services.desc: Vinyl, concrete, and rip-rap shoreline stabilization.

services.name: Manatee-zone dock builds
services.desc: Slow-speed, low-impact dock builds that pass FWC review.

projects.name: Snell Isle seawall replacement
projects.summary: 240ft vinyl seawall with helical tiebacks and matched coping.

projects.name: Tierra Verde manatee-zone dock
projects.summary: Elevated dock with grated decking to preserve seagrass below.

testimonials.author: Will M.
testimonials.quote: Two prior contractors said our setback wouldn't permit. Tideline got it through in 4 months.

faqs.q: How do you handle manatee-zone projects?
faqs.a: We pre-coordinate with FWC, use grated decking and minimal pilings, and schedule construction outside seasonal restrictions.
